lintStatus.notes: Fixed the BaseControl error on line 271 of Accordion.tsx. Remaining warnings are minor and pre-existing: experimental APIs (__experimentalToggleGroupControl, __experimentalToggleGroupControlOption, __experimentalInputControl) and useEffect missing dependency. These exist across the codebase and are not blocking.

syncStatus.details: PHP files now have proper docblocks documenting all camelCase variables. TSX BaseControl component now has required id prop. No changes to TSX/PHP sync - all previous fixes remain intact.

output.changesSummary: Applied all three QA fixes: (1) Added id='accordion-video-url-control' to BaseControl in Accordion.tsx line 272 to resolve major lint error, (2) Added comprehensive @var docblock to Accordion.php documenting all auto-extracted attribute variables, (3) Added @var docblock to AccordionItem.php documenting all auto-extracted attribute variables. Build and lint now pass successfully.

testPage.notes: Test page remains unchanged. All fixes were code quality improvements (lint compliance and PHP documentation) with no functional changes.
